Open app
Telegram storage, now human-friendly

A polished storage SaaS for nerds who want power without chaos.

TeleDrive makes Telegram-backed storage actually approachable: clean onboarding, browser uploads, remote imports, signed links, transfer tracking, and a workspace UX that feels like real software instead of a weekend admin panel.

Open the app See pricing
Easy onboarding

Get to your first upload fast with a guided setup flow.

Worker-based uploads

Use browser uploads and URL imports without thinking about queue internals.

Team-friendly UX

Workspaces, folders, links, plans, settings, and timelines in one clean shell.

Browser uploads

Drag files in and let workers take over.

Telegram routing

Keep integrations visible and understandable.

Signed links

Share safely with expiring access plans.

Team workflows

Bring teammates into a clearer storage UX.

Social proof

People like this because it feels like software they can trust.

“Finally a Telegram storage UI that doesn’t feel cursed.”

Indie infra operator

“The onboarding flow makes this way easier to hand to teammates.”

Growth engineer

“It feels like MultCloud for nerds who want control.”

How it works

From first click to transfer visibility in a few calm steps.

1
Connect a workspace

Choose where files should live.

2
Upload or import

Send files from your device or by URL.

3
Monitor and share

Track progress, generate links, and manage outcomes.

© 2026 TeleDrive. Built for nerds who want storage workflows without ugly tooling.
